name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready access to public data via MCP. T04 — US/UK Nonprofits: EIN lookup (IRS EO BMF + TEOS), name search, UK Charity Commission. T10 — OSS Vulnerability Intelligence: CVEs per package/version (OSV.dev), dependency graphs (deps.dev), CVE detail (NIST NVD), CycloneDX/SPDX SBOM auditing, SPDX licence lookups. T22 — Professional Licence Verification: NPI healthcare provider lookup (NPPES), FINRA BrokerCheck by CRD number, SAM.gov federal exclusions check. T07 — Domain & DNS Intelligence: RDAP lookup (IANA), SSL Certificate Transparency logs (crt.sh), DNS records via Cloudflare DoH, domain history from CT logs. T11 — Global Patent Intelligence: patent lookup by number (EPO OPS + USPTO PatentsView), keyword search, citation graphs, inventor portfolio. All responses are token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown with verified source URLs, fetch timestamps, and SHA-256 integrity hashes. Cache-first.

tools.name: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: Fetch IRS 990 data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns name, address, NTEE code, ruling date, revenue, expenses, and assets in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS EO BMF + IRS TEOS (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein('13-1837418'). No API key required.

tools.name: search_nonprofits_by_name
tools.description: Search US nonprofits by organisation name with optional state filter. Returns up to 25 results with EIN, revenue, NTEE code, and address in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS TEOS (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: search_nonprofits_by_name('Red Cross', 'CA'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_charity_uk
tools.description: Fetch UK registered charity details from the Charity Commission. Returns registration status, income, expenditure, and activities in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: UK Charity Commission (Open Government Licence v3.0). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_charity_uk('219099'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Fetch all known CVEs and security advisories for an open-source package version. Returns severity, CVSS score, fixed versions, and affected ranges in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD. Token-efficient. Example: fetch_package_vulnerabilities('requests', '2.28.0', 'PyPI'). No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_dependency_graph
tools.description: Fetch the full transitive dependency graph for a package version. Returns direct and transitive dependencies in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: deps.dev (Google Open Source Insights). Hard 8-second timeout. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_cve_detail
tools.description: Fetch full CVE detail by CVE ID from NIST NVD. Returns description, CVSS base score, severity level, affected products, and patch reference URLs in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NIST NVD (public domain). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_cve_detail('CVE-2023-32681'). No API key required.

tools.name: audit_sbom_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Audit a CycloneDX or SPDX Software Bill of Materials against OSV.dev. Returns per-component vulnerability count, highest severity, and advisory links in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: OSV.dev batch query API (Google). Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_package_licence
tools.description: Fetch the declared SPDX licence for any open source package version. Returns the licence identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, GPL-3.0) in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: deps.dev (Google Open Source Insights). Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_npi_provider
tools.description: Look up any US healthcare provider by NPI number. Returns provider name, enumeration type, taxonomy, practice address, and status in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry (CMS public domain). Token-efficient. Example: fetch_npi_provider('1234567890'). No API key required.

tools.name: search_npi_by_name
tools.description: Search the NPPES NPI Registry by provider name with optional state and speciality filters. Returns up to 10 matching providers in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry (CMS). Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_finra_broker
tools.description: Look up FINRA BrokerCheck registration data by CRD number. Returns registration status, qualifications, and disclosures in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: FINRA BrokerCheck public registry. Token-efficient. Example: fetch_finra_broker('1234567').

tools.name: check_sam_exclusion
tools.description: Check the SAM.gov federal exclusions list by name or EIN. Returns exclusion status, agency, and effective dates in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: SAM.gov public exclusions database. Token-efficient. Example: check_sam_exclusion('Acme Corp') or check_sam_exclusion('12-3456789').

tools.name: fetch_domain_rdap
tools.description: Fetch domain registration details via IANA RDAP (modern WHOIS replacement). Returns registrar, registration date, expiry date, nameservers, and registrant info in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IANA RDAP. Data freshness: 4-hour cache. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_ssl_certificate_chain
tools.description: Fetch SSL/TLS certificate transparency log entries for a domain from crt.sh. Returns certificate chain with issuer, validity dates, and common names in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: crt.sh Certificate Transparency. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_dns_records
tools.description: Fetch DNS records for a domain via Cloudflare DNS over HTTPS. Supports A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA, CAA, and SRV record types. Returns AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Cloudflare DoH. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_domain_history
tools.description: Fetch historical SSL/TLS certificate issuance for a domain from Certificate Transparency logs. Returns chronological cert history with issuers and validity periods in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: crt.sh. Token-efficient. No API key required.

tools.name: fetch_patent_by_number
tools.description: Fetch bibliographic data for a patent by number and jurisdiction (EP, US, WO). Returns title, applicants, inventors, IPC classification, and publication date in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: EPO OPS, USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient.

tools.name: search_patents_by_keyword
tools.description: Search patents by keyword across EP, US, or WO patent databases. Returns up to 10 matching records with title, applicant, publication date, and IPC codes in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: EPO OPS, USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_patent_citations
tools.description: Fetch forward and backward citations for a patent. Returns lists of citing and cited patents with titles and dates in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: EPO OPS, USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_inventor_portfolio
tools.description: Fetch the patent portfolio for an inventor, optionally filtered by assignee. Returns patent list with titles, publication dates, and jurisdictions in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified sources: EPO OPS, USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_feedback
tools.description: Report a data quality issue with any DataNexus tool response. Parameters: tool_id ('T04', 'T10', 'T22', 'T07', or 'T11'), query_hash (from the tool response), signal (incorrect_data, missing_field, stale_data, not_useful, wrong_entity), comment (optional). Returns {'status': 'recorded'} always. Token-efficient.

tools.name: report_mcpize_link
tools.description: Check whether DataNexus tools require a paid subscription and retrieve the upgrade URL if so. Returns status='free' or upgrade_url. Token-efficient.

tools.name: validate_tool_output
tools.description: Validate any DataNexus tool response for data quality anomalies. Two-layer validation: deterministic rules plus Haiku AI review on ambiguous findings. Never raises and never blocks — always returns a structured result. Token-efficient.

data_sources.name: IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File (EO BMF)
